goal: Drain the inbox strictly by weight. Top structural band first: acs-verdict-always-written-with-reason, ship-landed-verification-floor, loop-must-base-lanes-on-origin-main, percycle-audit-apicover-newexport-parity (3 live recurrences 2026-07-20: FleetRebase* and LandPrefixes — per-cycle audit must catch unnamed new exports BEFORE ship, closing the repo-wide apicover parity gap). Then the operator-directed solutions: triage-unified-solution-synthesis (root-cause synthesis across items, architecture-first unified fixes), codegraph blast-radius per docs/architecture/code-graph-blast-radius.md, telemetry coverage collectors (agy/codex usage capture, claude relaunch attribution). Every fix: TDD red-first, regression test, adversarial audit, wiring proof in the composed production path. No inert API.

phases.name: cycle-recorded
phases.key_findings: cycle completed; ledger walk deferred to future slice
